product_highlights: Cannabotech™ — cannabis plant stem cell extract for skin calming and regeneration
Ginseng Up™ — ginseng stem cell active for energy and vitality
Sustainable plant cell biofactories for rare bioactive production
Clinically validated actives with strong sustainability profile
notes: Vytrus Biotech is a Spanish biotechnology company specializing in plant cell culture technology for cosmetic applications. Their innovative approach uses plant stem cells as biofactories to produce rare and potent bioactive compounds in a sustainable and scalable manner. Vytrus's portfolio includes cannabis stem cell extracts (Cannabotech™), ginseng stem cell actives (Ginseng Up™), and other plant cell culture-derived ingredients with strong clinical validation and excellent sustainability credentials.
